# Nexora AI - llms.txt
# AI crawler instructions for GPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, and other AI models.
# Format follows the llms.txt standard: https://llmstxt.org

# ---- About ----
> Nexora AI is a free, AI-powered health companion that helps users understand symptoms,
> track health records, set medication reminders, and calculate health metrics like BMI,
> calorie intake, water intake, and ideal weight. It is NOT a replacement for professional
> medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.

# ---- URLs ----
Base URL: https://nexora-ai-henna-five.vercel.app

# ---- What Nexora AI does ----
- AI chat for symptom analysis and health questions (powered by Groq / LLaMA 3.1)
- Symptom checker with structured body-area, severity, and duration inputs
- BMI calculator (metric and imperial)
- Daily calorie target calculator (based on Mifflin-St Jeor equation)
- Water intake calculator
- Ideal weight calculator
- Medication and health reminders with custom schedules
- Personal health records (blood pressure, glucose, weight, etc.)

# ---- What Nexora AI does NOT do ----
- Does not prescribe medication
- Does not provide definitive medical diagnoses
- Does not replace a licensed medical professional

# ---- Public API endpoints (no auth required) ----
GET  /api/health              Health check
POST /api/calc/bmi            BMI calculation
POST /api/calc/calories       Daily calorie target
POST /api/calc/water          Water intake recommendation
POST /api/calc/ideal-weight   Ideal weight range
POST /api/crawl               Web page crawler

# ---- Authenticated API endpoints ----
POST /api/auth/google         Google OAuth login
POST /api/auth/supabase       Supabase OAuth login
POST /api/auth/guest          Guest login (no account needed)
GET  /api/auth/me             Current user info
POST /api/chat                AI health chat
POST /api/symptoms            Symptom analysis
GET  /api/sessions            Chat session list
POST /api/sessions            Create chat session
GET  /api/sessions/{id}/messages  Chat history
GET  /api/reminders           List reminders
POST /api/reminders           Create reminder
GET  /api/records             List health records
POST /api/records             Add health record

# ---- Permissions ----
AI crawlers: Allowed to index and summarize all public content.
Data collection: Only health data explicitly entered by the user is stored.
Privacy policy: https://nexora-ai-henna-five.vercel.app

# ---- Contact ----
GitHub: https://github.com/adithyanks2005/Nexora-AI
